confirm.description: Do you want to add the Iceco Refrigerator at {address}?

user.description: Enter the Bluetooth address of your Iceco refrigerator, or it will be auto-discovered.

select_device.description: Select your Iceco refrigerator from the discovered devices.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the refrigerator. Make sure it is powered on and within range.

init.description: Configure alarm and monitoring settings for your Iceco refrigerator.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to check connection health (30-300 seconds)
data_description.power_loss_timeout: Time without updates before triggering power loss alarm (10-120 minutes)
data_description.temp_deviation_threshold: Temperature difference from setpoint to trigger alarm (1-10°C)
data_description.temp_deviation_duration: How long temperature must be off before alarming (5-60 minutes)
